name: alpine-fieldops-voice-agent
description: Browser-based OpenAI realtime voice-agent demo for a fictional EV-charger and solar-battery field-service operation.

scripts.test:live: node --import tsx packages/evals/src/live-voice-preflight.ts && playwright test -c playwright.live.config.ts && node --import tsx packages/evals/src/live-voice-smoke.ts --write
scripts.test:live-audio: node --import tsx packages/evals/src/live-voice-preflight.ts && node --import tsx packages/evals/src/live-audio-fixture.ts && playwright test -c playwright.live-audio.config.ts && node --import tsx packages/evals/src/live-audio-checklist.ts --write --automated
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run evals && npm run test:ui && npm run build && npm run audit && npm run docs:list
